name: Orbital Precision Strike
description: Calls a single precise orbital strike. Reliable single-target orbital option.

name: Orbital Airburst Strike
description: Launches a burst of shrapnel mid-air, effective against lightly armored targets.

name: Orbital 120MM HE Barrage
description: Saturates an area with 120mm shells. Large area denial.

name: Orbital 380MM HE Barrage
description: Massive 380mm barrage. Huge radius, extreme damage. Unpredictable.

name: Orbital Laser
description: Sweeping orbital laser. Destroys everything in its path. Limited uses per mission.

name: Orbital Railcannon Strike
description: A single armor-piercing railcannon round. Excellent vs. heavy targets.

name: Orbital Gas Strike
description: Releases toxic gas cloud. Effective against unarmored units.

name: Orbital EMS Strike
description: Electromagnetic pulse that immobilizes enemies in an area.

name: Orbital Smoke Strike
description: Creates a smoke screen to obscure enemy vision.

name: Eagle Strafing Run
description: Eagle aircraft strafes a line with autocannon fire. Fast cooldown, multiple uses.

name: Eagle Airstrike
description: Drops multiple bombs along a line. Good balance of area coverage.

name: Eagle 110MM Rocket Pods
description: Eagle delivers armor-piercing rocket pods. Excellent vs. armored targets.

name: Eagle 500KG Bomb
description: Single massive bomb. Devastating radius. Kills virtually anything.

name: Eagle Napalm Airstrike
description: Drops napalm creating a line of fire. Excellent vs. Terminids.

name: Eagle Cluster Bomb
description: Scatters cluster munitions over an area. Devastating against groups.

name: Eagle Smoke Strike
description: Creates a smoke screen along a line.

name: MG-43 Machine Gun
description: High-capacity machine gun. Effective sustained fire against medium enemies.

name: Anti-Materiel Rifle
description: High-velocity rifle penetrating heavy armor. Precision anti-heavy tool.

name: M-105 Stalwart
description: Light machine gun allowing movement while firing. High ammo capacity.

name: EAT-17 Expendable AT
description: Disposable anti-tank launcher. Single-shot rocket, short cooldown.

name: RS-422 Railgun
description: Precision railgun with adjustable charge. Can penetrate any armor at full charge.

name: FLAM-40 Flamethrower
description: Sprays napalm in a wide arc. Exceptional vs. Terminids and groups.

name: AC-8 Autocannon
description: Rapid-fire 20mm cannon. Excellent anti-medium and anti-heavy versatility.

name: GL-21 Grenade Launcher
description: Fires explosive grenades. Great area clear for lightly armored groups.

name: LAS-98 Laser Cannon
description: Sustained laser weapon. Excellent precision, heats over time. Effective vs. medium enemies.

name: A/ARC-3 Arc Thrower
description: Fires arc electricity chaining to multiple enemies. Excellent vs. Illuminate.

name: LAS-99 Quasar Cannon
description: High-power laser charge cannon. No ammo needed, rechargeable. Anti-tank capable.

name: FAF-14 Spear
description: Lock-on anti-tank missile launcher. Excellent vs. heavy targets at range.

name: LIFT-850 Jump Pack
description: Enables large leaps. Great for repositioning and traversal.

name: SH-32 Shield Generator Pack
description: Projects a personal energy shield. Absorbs damage before armor.

name: B-1 Supply Pack
description: Carries extra supply canisters. Resupply yourself and teammates.

name: AX/AR-23 Guard Dog
description: Drone that automatically fires on nearby enemies. Effective vs. light enemies.

name: AX/LAS-5 Guard Dog Rover
description: Laser-equipped drone. Better accuracy, less friendly fire than ballistic version.

name: A/MG-43 Machine Gun Sentry
description: Automated machine gun turret. Good sustained fire against light-medium enemies.

name: A/G-16 Gatling Sentry
description: High-ROF gatling turret. Shreds light and medium enemies rapidly.

name: A/M-12 Mortar Sentry
description: Automated mortar. Long range, good area denial. Careful of friendly fire.

name: A/AC-8 Autocannon Sentry
description: Automated autocannon. Excellent anti-armor capability for a sentry.

name: A/MLS-4X Rocket Sentry
description: Fires anti-armor rockets. Excellent vs. heavy ground targets.

name: A/M-23 EMS Mortar Sentry
description: Fires EMS rounds that immobilize enemies. Excellent crowd control.

name: A/ARC-3 Tesla Tower
description: Electric tower zapping nearby enemies. Excellent vs. light enemies and Illuminate.

name: EXO-45 Patriot Exosuit
description: Deployable mech suit. Rocket launcher + minigun. Extreme mobility and firepower.

name: EXO-49 Emancipator Exosuit
description: Dual autocannon mech. Excellent sustained anti-armor firepower.

name: E/MG-101 HMG Emplacement
description: Stationary heavy machine gun. Massive firepower, limited arc.

name: FX-12 Shield Generator Relay
description: Projects a dome shield protecting allies inside from projectiles.

name: A/P-19 Anti-Personnel Minefield
description: Scatters anti-personnel mines. Excellent area denial vs. light enemies.

name: GR-8 Recoilless Rifle
description: Team-reloadable anti-tank rocket launcher. Highest single-shot damage of any support weapon.

name: RL-77 Airburst Rocket Launcher
description: Fires rockets that detonate mid-air, showering shrapnel on enemies below cover.

name: R-6 Commando
description: Four-shot unguided rocket launcher. Portable, effective vs. heavy targets.

name: MG-206 Heavy Machine Gun
description: Devastating heavy machine gun. High penetration and massive suppression.

name: Orbital Napalm Barrage
description: Saturates an area with napalm shells, creating a lasting fire zone.

name: Orbital Darkfluid Bombardment
description: Rains volatile dark fluid. Devastating anti-Illuminate weapon with energy suppression.

name: MD-17 Anti-Tank Mines
description: Deploys high-explosive anti-tank mines. Excellent vs. armored vehicles.

name: A/FLAM-40 Incinerator Turret
description: Automated flamethrower sentry. Shreds lightly armored enemies with fire.
